# Rick Broider

Rick Broider helps founders, entrepreneurs, consultants, coaches, and small business owners build, rebuild, or regenerate their business live.

Primary services:
- Digital transformation consulting
- Website development consulting
- MVP consulting
- Fractional CTO guidance for non-technical founders
- AI consulting for small business

Primary pages:
- /index.html
- /about.html
- /book.html
- /services/digital-transformation-consultant.html
- /services/website-development-consultant.html
- /services/mvp-consultant.html
- /services/fractional-cto-for-non-technical-founders.html
- /services/ai-consultant-for-small-business.html
- /resources/clarity-to-prosperity-scorecard.html
- /resources/7-structural-gaps-behind-project-collapse.html

Core promise:
Help visionaries get from clarity to prosperity with live strategic guidance, AI-assisted support, and hands-on website or app development when needed.
